zh.Macclesfield, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾馬可萊斯費爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Matthew Bostock於1400年出生在英國爾保斯托時，他的父親Hugh Bostock33歲，母親Joan Rudheath de Heath25歲。他於1438年與Ellena Boswell在英國英格蘭爾埃爾頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1510年享年110歲。

zh-hans.Macclesfield, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾馬可萊斯費爾德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matthew Bostock于1400年出生在英国爾保斯托时，他的父亲Hugh Bostock33岁，母亲Joan Rudheath de Heath25岁。他于1438年与Ellena Boswell在英国英格兰爾埃爾頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1510年享年110岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bostock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Bostock in Cheshire (Botestoch in Domesday Book), so named with an Old English personal name Bōta (see Bott ) + Old English stoc ‘place’.

variants.name: Bostwick
meanings: English (Yorkshire): in northwestern England perhaps a variant of Bostock , and in southeastern England a variant of Bastick (see Bostick 1) with rounding of the vowel.

variants.name: Bott
meanings: English: nickname from Old French bot ‘toad’ (compare Bottrell ). Alternatively, from the Middle English personal name Botte (a survival of Old English Botta). Compare Botting .
South German: occupational name for a messenger, from Middle High German bote ‘messenger, emissary’.

nameMeanings.name: Matthew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the Christian evangelist, author of the first gospel in the New Testament. His name is a form of the Hebrew name Mattathia, meaning ‘gift of God’, which is fairly common in the Old Testament, being rendered in the Authorized Version in a number of different forms: Mattan(i)ah, Mattatha(h), Mattithiah, Mattathias, and so on. In the Authorized Version, the evangelist is regularly referred to as Matthew, while the apostle chosen to replace Judas Iscariot is distinguished as Matthias . A related name from the same Hebrew roots, but reversed, is Jonathan . Throughout the English-speaking world Matthew has been particularly popular since the 1970s.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Matthew Bostock was born in 1400, in Bostock, Cheshire, England, his father, Hugh Bostock, was 33 and his mother, Joan Rudheath de Heath, was 25. He married Ellena Boswell in 1438, in Elton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1510, at the age of 110.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matthew Bostock est né en 1400, à Bostock, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh Bostock, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Joan Rudheath de Heath, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Ellena Boswell en 1438, à Elton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1510, à l’âge de 110 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matthew Bostock 1400 in Bostock, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh Bostock 33 und seine Mutter Joan Rudheath de Heath 25. Er hat 1438 in Elton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Ellena Boswell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1510 im Alter von 110 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Matthew Bostock è nato il nel 1400 nel Bostock, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Hugh Bostock, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Joan Rudheath de Heath, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Ellena Boswell nel 1438, nel Elton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1510, all'età di 110 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Matthew Bostockが1400年にイギリスチェシュアイアボストックで生まれた時，父Hugh Bostockは33歳，母Joan Rudheath de Heathは25歳であった。1438年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアエルトンでEllena Boswellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1510年に110歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Matthew Bostock(이)가 1400년 영국 체실르 보스톡에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh Bostock(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Rudheath de Heath(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1438년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 엘턴에서 Ellena Boswell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1510년 110세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Matthew Bostock nasceu em 1400, em Bostock, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh Bostock, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Joan Rudheath de Heath, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Ellena Boswell em 1438, em Elton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1510, com 110 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matthew Bostock родился в 1400 г. в местности бостокк, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh Bostock было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Rudheath de Heath, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellena Boswell в 1438 г. в местности элтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1510 г. в возрасте 110 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Matthew Bostock nació en 1400, en Bostock, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh Bostock, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Joan Rudheath de Heath, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Ellena Boswell en 1438, en Elton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1510, a la edad de 110 años.
